description: Align technical SEO and domain behavior around misslanatheatre.com while preserving the current pre-launch noindex state until the final stabilization task. Implement correct canonical host behavior, metadata, schema, sitemap/robots readiness, and a verified one-hop 301 redirect map from the legacy and protective domains. Pricing content remains only From $350.
non_goals: Do not remove site-wide noindex or publicly launch the site
Do not create blog posts, city landing pages, thin local pages, or keyword-stuffed copy
Do not create or verify Google Business Profile if owner/account verification cannot be completed in this task
Do not change brand concept, page design, form behavior, or pricing strategy
Do not delete domain registrations or cancel renewals
Do not publish private address in schema, GBP preparation, or page content

decision_basis.origin: User-approved seven-task implementation plan after live-site review and owner questionnaire review on 2026-06-27.
investigation_findings: Canonical production domain is misslanatheatre.com and protective misslanatheater.com must redirect to it
Legacy magic-castle-puppet-theater.com must redirect to relevant new routes rather than remain a competing old site
The site is intentionally pre-launch/noindex until trust, form, SEO, and QA gates pass
Metadata and structured data must use the owned Theatre spelling while still supporting generic American theater search intent
A service-area business must not expose the owner's residential address

must_read: deployment and DNS configuration available to the repository
must_not_violate: Canonical owned brand spelling is Theatre
Private home address must not be published
Redirects must be permanent server/CDN 301 responses and should be one hop
Do not redirect every old URL blindly to Home when a relevant new route exists
Do not add Review schema without visible verified reviews
Do not use Event/TheaterEvent schema in a misleading way for evergreen show catalog pages

forbidden_execution_patterns: No keyword stuffing or duplicate title/description templates that ignore page intent
No address publication in LocalBusiness/PerformingGroup schema
No false GBP completion claim without account-level evidence
execution_guardrails: Choose one canonical host form and redirect the alternative host to it consistently
Keep sitemap generated from real public routes only and exclude internal /design
Preserve noindex globally but make robots/sitemap implementation launch-ready
Use schema types that match current visible content and service-area reality
Create and verify an explicit legacy redirect map before changing domain behavior
Treat DNS/hosting access limitations as launch blockers, not as completed work
Pricing metadata and schema must not introduce any price beyond From $350

readiness_notes: Access to primary, protective, and legacy domain/DNS/hosting controls is required for redirect completion
Public route set must be stable enough to map

in_scope: Canonical-host decision and one-hop host redirects
Metadata/title/description/canonical/OG audit and correction for all public routes
Launch-ready sitemap and robots behavior while retaining pre-launch noindex
Legacy old-URL inventory and explicit redirect map
Protective and legacy domain 301 implementation and verification
Search Console property/readiness checklist and sitemap submission instructions
GBP data-preparation artifact without claiming profile completion unless verified

steps.title: Audit current technical SEO
actions: Inventory public routes, metadata, canonical tags, schema, robots, sitemap, noindex sources, host variants, and internal routes
Record conflicts and duplicate patterns in the task report
steps.expectation: Every public route and indexing control has a known current state

steps.title: Normalize canonical host and metadata
actions: Choose and document the canonical www or apex host based on current production configuration
Ensure all metadata, canonical URLs, OG URLs, schema URLs, and sitemap URLs use that host
Correct owned brand spelling while preserving relevant generic theater intent
steps.expectation: The new site has one coherent canonical identity

steps.title: Correct structured data
actions: Use service-area PerformingGroup/LocalBusiness data without a public residential address
Use Service, BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage only where visible content supports them
Review show schema and avoid misleading scheduled-event semantics
Exclude unverified reviews, ratings, safety, vendor, and document claims
steps.expectation: Structured data accurately represents the visible business and pages

steps.title: Prepare sitemap and robots for controlled launch
actions: Generate sitemap from real public routes and exclude /design and non-public surfaces
Keep current pre-launch noindex behavior intact
Document the exact single change required by the final launch task to enable indexing
steps.expectation: Indexing controls are safe now and launch-ready later

steps.title: Implement protective and legacy redirects
actions: Inventory old legacy URLs and map each to the closest new route
Configure misslanatheater.com and all host variants to one-hop 301 to the canonical domain
Configure magic-castle-puppet-theater.com and its important URLs to one-hop 301 destinations
Verify HTTP/HTTPS, www/apex, paths, query handling, loops, and status codes
steps.expectation: Old and alternate domains no longer compete with the canonical site

steps.title: Prepare search operations
actions: Create Search Console property and sitemap submission checklist
Create GBP field packet with name, categories, service areas, phone, site, description, and media needs
Create a 404/redirect monitoring checklist for launch and the first 30 days
steps.expectation: The operator has a clear, evidence-based search launch procedure

success_criteria: All new-site URLs use one canonical production host
Protective and legacy domains return one-hop 301 redirects to mapped new URLs
No old independent site remains publicly serving contradictory brand content after redirect activation
Metadata and schema use Theatre for the owned brand and contain no private address or unverified claims
Sitemap excludes internal routes and is ready for launch submission
Public pricing in metadata/schema remains limited to From $350
Required automated and manual checks pass

manual_checks: Inspect canonical, robots, sitemap, metadata, and JSON-LD for representative routes
Verify noindex remains on every intended public route before final launch
Verify each important old URL maps to the closest relevant new URL
Verify no private address appears in HTML, JSON-LD, sitemap, metadata, or GBP packet
Confirm no Review schema or misleading Event schedule data is present

closure_sequence: Step 1: Scope verification — confirm all steps, success_criteria, and deliverables are complete; confirm execution-safety compliance (no non_goals fixed, no forbidden_execution_patterns violated, execution_guardrails respected)
Step 2: Automated verification — run only the required_commands explicitly listed for the scoped task, confirm all pass
Step 3: Reviewer-grade pre-closure code review — analyze all changes against the review dimensions, record explicit findings with BLOCKER / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / NOTE severity
Step 4: Closure resolution — resolve or explicitly defer findings with severity, write the final verification summary, and update the task report
Step 5: PROJECT_PROGRESS update — append the substantive change entry only after all previous closure steps pass

post_actions: Do not submit the launch sitemap or remove noindex until STABILIZE_MISS_LANA_PRELAUNCH_001 passes
Keep domain renewal/control information documented privately and do not expose credentials
